arts.sum: BBC Sport looks at Manchester City's recent transfer dealings and asks if they should be active in January - and who they could sign.

arts.ttl: Shearer on his 'concerns' for Man City
arts.sum: Match of the Day's Alan Shearer says Manchester City are showing "worrying signs" after losing 4-0 to Tottenham at home, their fifth loss in a row.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Feyenoord live early team news plus kick-off time and how to watch
arts.sum: Manchester City will look to return to winning ways against Feyenoord in the Champions League at the Etihad on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: BrandEd launch the 'Manchester City Sports Business School'
arts.sum: In collaboration with Manchester City, the new venture builds on the foundations set by the City Football Leadership Institute (CFLI), originally launched in 2022, and continues to signal the lasting commitment to offering world-leading industry-based education. With Manchester City Sports Business School, BrandEd and Manchester City aim to provide students with exclusive access to a global sports business ecosystem, combining BrandEd’s educational expertise with Manchester City’s deep industry knowledge.

arts.ttl: Vicario played with a broken ankle for an hour during Spurs win over Man City
arts.sum: Guglielmo Vicario has revealed he broke his ankle during during Spurs’ 4-0 win over Manchester City – but played on for an hour anyway. The Italian goalkeeper required treatment following a collision with Man City winger Savinho in the first half.
